title: [MTR] ETR 470
description: ETR 470 addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the ETR 470 to the game.
It contains the Cisalpino and Swiss variants. For the Greek version, check out the [Greek addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/greek-mtr)!

[Check out my other HSR packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)

## Enjoy!

![ETR470s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b2cd825cf3b8fe8ec42c2dcebe299dccfa8eea5.jpeg)
